title: Add t_dpi_open_query to test DPI array query functions

features.name: DPI import function with open array argument
features.description: Code should include a DPI import function declaration with an open array (unsized) argument using empty brackets syntax
features.snippet: import "DPI" function int cSvSize1(input byte arr[], input int idx);

features.name: dynamic array passed to DPI function call
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array (created with new[]) being passed as argument to a DPI function call with open array parameter

features.name: DPI array size query with dynamic array
features.description: Code should include calling a DPI array size query function on a dynamic array in a context where the result is compared with relational operators
